info.name: JD Parser API
info.description: API endpoints for JD Parser - Recruiting Platform

formdata.description: Upload PDF, DOCX, or TXT file

request.description: Upload a JD file and parse it with AI

body.raw:
{
  "jdText": "Function- Home loan
Designation: Sales Officer
Salary - 1.80 LPA to 2.10 LPA CTC + Lucrative Incentives

Job description:
1. Area/Lane/Geography Mapping
2. Source Relationship Management
3. Maintain Reports

Candidate Eligibility:
1. Graduate from any stream
2. 1 Year experience in sales"
}

request.description: Parse JD text directly without file upload

body.raw:
{
  "recruiter_rid": "REC123",
  "parsedData": {
    "company_name": "HDFC Limited",
    "role_name": "Sales Officer",
    "city": "Mumbai",
    "state": "Maharashtra",
    "pincode": "400001",
    "positions_open": 5,
    "skills": "Sales, Communication, Customer Relationship Management, Reporting",
    "experience": "1 Year",
    "salary": "1.80 LPA to 2.10 LPA + Incentives",
    "qualification": "Graduate from any stream",
    "benefits": "Lucrative Incentives",
    "job_description": "Full job description here...",
    "revenue": 0,
    "access_mode": "open"
  }
}

request.description: Save parsed JD data to database
